fields.label: Zone Name
fields.description: Display name for this zone (e.g., Zone 1 - Marmara)

fields.label: Zone Code
fields.description: Unique zone identifier (e.g., Z1, MARMARA, INTERNATIONAL)

fields.label: Countries
fields.description: Comma-separated country codes (e.g., TR, DE, FR). Leave empty for domestic zones.

fields.label: Regions
fields.description: Comma-separated region/state codes (e.g., 34, 06, 35 for Istanbul, Ankara, Izmir)

fields.label: Base Rate
fields.description: Base shipping rate for this zone

fields.label: Rate per KG
fields.description: Additional rate per kilogram for this zone

fields.label: Estimated Days
fields.description: Estimated delivery time in business days for this zone
